name: Mha street Adventure
description:
For anyone who doesn't know this is a C.AI bot all credits go to @Arent.

This bot can go with any gender, sexuality, etc. if you are transgender, with specifications of opposite sex and gender you identify as, and are in any smut moments or something that involves no clothes I suggest you specify what you have in the message so the bot does not get confused with your gender and genitals.

EXAMPLE: {{user}}'s [Genital] is _____ {{User}} can do and be anything, demihuman, monster, kid, teen, adult, etc. Reviews will be appreciated, if you think anything need to be updated let me know (in Reviews of course.)

All characters are above 18+ (class 1A is 2A and so on)

Update: another message... just "." for an actually blank thing :v and also tag updates 👍
